# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Create a Google Cloud Deployment Manager template for a Cloud Storage bucket to host static website assets. Grant allUsers read access so the website can serve files publicly. Set storageClass to STANDARD for performance. This is for our public-facing website storage on GCP.

Prevent cloud iam misconfiguration.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

resources:
  - type: 'storage.v1.bucket'
    name: 'public-website-assets'
    properties:
      location: 'US' # Region where the bucket will be created
      storageClass: 'STANDARD'
      labels:
        environment: 'prod'
      accessControl:
        uniformBucketLevelAccess:
          enabled: true
      iamMemberBinding:
      - member: 'allUsers'
        role: 'roles/storage.objectViewer'

  - type: 'iam.v1.serviceAccount'
    name: 'public-website-assets-sa'
    properties:
      disableServiceAccountKeyCreation: true

  - type: 'iam.v1.serviceAccountIamMember'
    name: 'public-website-assets-sa-member'
    properties:
      member: 'serviceAccount:public-website-assets-sa@PROJECT_ID.iam.gserviceaccount.com'
      role: 'roles/iam.serviceAccountUser'
